task_completion.description: Initiate the personal data export for the target user in WordPress.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress 'Export Personal Data' screen showing 'alex.rebel@example.com' added to the request list, or the agent clicking to download the personal data.

task_completion.description: Save the exported personal data to the specified legal holds directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or browser download dialog showing the exported zip file saved exactly at '/home/ga/legal_holds/alex_rebel_export.zip'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the personal data erasure for the target user in WordPress.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress 'Erase Personal Data' screen showing 'alex.rebel@example.com' added to the erasure request list.

task_completion.description: Confirm the erasure of the user's personal data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Erase Personal Data' screen showing the status as 'Completed' or a success message indicating the personal data for 'alex.rebel@example.com' has been erased/anonymized.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Users list and initiate deletion of the target user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress 'Users' screen showing the agent clicking 'Delete' for the user 'alex_rebel', leading to the 'Delete Users' confirmation page.

task_completion.description: Reassign the user's posts to 'admin' and complete the account deletion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Delete Users' screen showing the radio button 'Attribute all content to:' selected with 'admin' chosen in the dropdown, followed by a success message that the user was deleted.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress admin panel GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with the WordPress admin interface in a web browser, rather than bypassing the UI using WP-CLI commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the export file was genuinely downloaded from WordPress.
integrity.visual_evidence: The zip file should be downloaded via the browser's download manager or a legitimate curl/wget command to the WordPress export link, not artificially created using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo'.

integrity.description: Verify user deletion and post reassignment were done via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The deletion and reassignment must occur within the WordPress 'Users' interface, not via direct database manipulation (e.g., MySQL CLI or phpMyAdmin).
